Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Hairong Interconnect Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Hairong Interconnect Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly deceptive 'universal IT integrator and value-added telecom shell in a cultural industrial park.' The forensic engine has completely eradicated the underlying cross-border hardware OEM data pollution triggered by Apple Inc. Deceived by the extremely massive and hardcore 'R&D of broadcast television transmission equipment and satellite reception equipment' listed in its license, along with its multi-million registered capital, the official commercial system crudely categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, physical probes and OSINT reconnaissance directly punctured this heavy-industry disguise: this is a sole proprietorship enterprise, its paid-in capital is only 400,000 RMB, and the 2024 insured headcount is only 7 people. The most fatal demotion strike comes from its registered address: 'No. 9 Bancang Street, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' No. 9 Bancang Street is Nanjing's famous 'Window of the World Cultural Industrial Park' (a creative park transformed from the former site of the Nanjing Watch Factory), which is filled with cultural media, software design, and asset-light creative companies. In such an artsy cultural and creative park, relying on 7 people to establish a heavy-industry assembly line for satellite TV transmission equipment? This not only violates physical common sense but is entirely out of place with the park's positioning. Reviewing its extremely cluttered business license: spanning from system integration and security engineering all the way to 'animation product design,' 'advertising production agency,' and 'Category II value-added telecommunications services.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a major satellite or communication equipment manufacturing plant; this is a Micro IT Integrator & Telecom Services Proxy hidden within a cultural creative park. The boss uses this all-purpose tech shell primarily to take on some weak-current engineering jobs, act as a proxy for communication equipment, and even dabble in website/advertising business, functioning entirely as an asset-light business services company.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 72)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / MICRO IT INTEGRATOR & TELECOM PROXY
